title: Largest and smallest element of an array

content.problemStatement:
Given NNN space separated integers, please perform the following operations


Find the smallest element of the array and store it as the variable smallsmallsmall
Find the largest element of the array and store it as the variable largelargelarge

Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of a two lines of input

1st1^{st}1st line contains the integer NNN
2nd2^{nd}2nd line contains NNN space separated integers - denoting the array AAA




Output Format

For each test case, output on a single line the 2 integers smallsmallsmall and largelargelarge
